rationale: Review 2 caught a real, on-rubric proof-quality issue — the lone bare load-bearing `simp` at line 73 inside `fiberHomeomorph`, inconsistent with the file's otherwise uniform `simp only`/`simpa only` style and reliant on default-set lemmas — which I confirmed against the diff; acting on it makes the proof more robust, whereas Review 1's no-findings approve leaves it unaddressed.
